summary: Iteration 203 Observatory module testing complete. All 25 backend tests passed (100%). All 14 frontend features verified. Observatory page loads with 3 tabs (Orrery, Deep Sky, Live Events). Orrery shows interactive SVG solar system with 8 animated planets. Deep Sky shows 10 star cards with sonify buttons. Live Events shows moon phase and celestial events. Orbital Hub has Observatory satellite (13 total satellites). Backend regression tests pass.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 203 Observatory module fully working. (1) Backend: GET /api/observatory/planets returns 8 planets with hz, orbital_speed_km_s, distance_au, light_time_minutes. GET /api/observatory/stars returns 10 stars with distance_ly, temp_k, sonified_hz, light_departed_year. GET /api/observatory/events returns events list and moon phase with illumination. POST /api/observatory/sonify with type=planet/star returns frequency_hz, harmonics, character. (2) Frontend: /observatory route loads with data-testid='observatory-page'. 3 tabs: observatory-tab-orrery, observatory-tab-stars, observatory-tab-events. Orrery tab shows interactive SVG solar system with animated planets, sonify-planet-btn. Deep Sky tab shows 10 star cards (star-{name}) with sonify buttons (sonify-{name}). Live Events tab shows moon-phase-card and celestial-events-card. (3) OrbCorner (data-testid='orb-corner') visible on /observatory. (4) Orbital Hub has satellite-observatory in outer ring (13 total satellites). (5) Backend regression: GET /api/workshop/platonic-solids and GET /api/mastery/tier still work.
